prompt_text: Make vs n8n pricing and features
response:
# Make vs n8n: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing Structure**

| **Plan** | **Make** | **n8n** |
|----------|---------|---------|
| **Free** | 1,000 operations/month | 1,000 tasks/month (self-hosted free) |
| **Basic** | $9.99/mo (10K ops) | $20/mo (50K tasks) |
| **Standard** | $24.99/mo (50K ops) | $50/mo (200K tasks) |
| **Pro** | $99/mo (200K ops) | $200/mo (1M tasks) |
| **Team/Enterprise** | Custom pricing | Custom pricing |

**Cost per operation:** Make ~$0.0005-0.001, n8n ~$0.0001-0.0002 (at scale)

---

## **Key Features Comparison**

### **Make**
✅ **Strengths:**
- 1000+ pre-built integrations
- Excellent visual builder (very intuitive)
- Strong template library
- Advanced filtering & mapping
- Good for non-technical users
- Webhook support
- Real-time execution

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Operations counted generously (expensive at scale)
- Limited code execution
- Less transparent pricing
- Smaller community

### **n8n**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Self-hosted option (unlimited, truly free)
- Can host on your own infrastructure
- Strong code node capabilities (JavaScript/Python)
- Better for developers
- More affordable at scale
- Open-source
- Better data privacy

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Steeper learning curve
- Fewer pre-built integrations (~400)
- Less polished UI
- Smaller marketplace/templates
- Requires more technical setup

---

## **When to Use Each**

| **Choose Make if...** | **Choose n8n if...** |
|----------------------|---------------------|
| You're non-technical | You need self-hosting |
| Need quick setup | Want maximum cost savings |
| Require many integrations | Prefer open-source |
| Building simple workflows | Building complex logic |
| Want minimal learning curve | Have developer skills |

---

## **Real-World Cost Scenario**

**100K operations/month:**
- **Make:** ~$25-50/month
- **n8n (Cloud):** ~$50/month
- **n8n (Self-hosted):** Free + server costs (~$10-20/mo)

**1M operations/month:**
- **Make:** ~$200+/month
- **n8n (Cloud):** ~$200-400/month
- **n8n (Self-hosted):** ~$50-100/month (server)

---

**TL;DR:** Make wins on ease & integrations; n8n wins on cost & flexibility at scale.
